"D:\Program Files\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\stream_core_shared.dir/objects.a
D:\Software\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\stream_core_shared.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\stream_core_shared.dir\objects1.rsp
D:\Software\mingw64\bin\g++.exe -shared -o campus_guard_stream.dll -Wl,--out-implib,libcampus_guard_stream.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\stream_core_shared.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive @CMakeFiles\stream_core_shared.dir\linkLibs.rsp
